title: Shorter Swords
description: Changes the sword textures to make them shorter
body:
# What is this
As the name implies it changes the textures of swords to make them shorter

# How do i install it
## Modrinth app way
Click on your modrinth minecraft profile(not your account) and add content on the change the tab to Resource Packs and search this pack and click install
## Manual way
drop the .zip file in the resource pack folder(go to options resource packs..., open pack folder)
